fields.label: Stage Reference
fields.description: Maps this condition to its logical stage. Flattened to Permit level because Frappe does not support nested child tables.

fields.label: Condition Label
fields.description: Human-readable name, e.g. 'Trade License Copy', 'DCD NOC', 'Fire Inspection Passed'.

fields.label: AI Confidence
fields.description: 0.0-1.0. Confidence score from Flowise classification/validation. Null if condition was manually checked, no AI involved.

fields.label: AI Reasoning
fields.description: Structured explanation (JSON or plain text) of WHY the AI suggested this status. Officer must review this before setting condition_status manually. AI never sets condition_status directly.

fields.label: Blocking
fields.description: If checked, this condition must be Met before the stage can advance.
